notes: JTBD ordering locked (who / setup / behaviour / recent / evolution). Non-goals ratified: no editable notes, no per-character P&L chart, no comparison view. Accessibility spelled out: colour + text on status pills; aria-label on setup diagrams. Sae/Kunigami low-data risk explicitly framed (source_hint copy handles it).
review_criteria: Index card grid + one bio-detail mock at both desktop and 375px
Status pill styling for active / standby / retired distinct without relying on colour alone
